pages.text: Create's $(bold)Train Track$() is laid by hand or paved by a contraption, and bends into smooth curves and slopes nothing else in Minecraft can.$(br2)A $(bold)train$() is itself a contraption: $(bold)Train Bogeys$() for wheels, $(bold)Train Casing$() to clad it, and a $(bold)Train Controls$() seat. Assemble it at a $(bold)Train Station$() and you can drive it by hand or hand it a schedule.
pages.title: Track & Trains
